title: Container Image And Runtime Management
description: Practice RHCSA v9 image inspection, podman, skopeo, Containerfile work, bind mounts, and container systemd unit generation.

tasks: Inspect localhost/rhcsa-httpd-base:latest and save the inspection output to /root/rhcsa-httpd-base.inspect.json, loading /opt/rhcsa/container-assets/rhcsa-httpd-base.tar first if the image is missing.
Create a Containerfile under /opt/rhcsa/workspaces/container that builds an image named localhost/rhcsa-web:latest.

Run a container named rhcsa-web publishing host port 8080 to the container service port and bind-mount /opt/rhcsa/workspaces/container/site-content into the container with the correct SELinux handling.
Generate a systemd unit for the container so it can be managed persistently.
solution_commands: podman image exists localhost/rhcsa-httpd-base:latest || podman load -i /opt/rhcsa/container-assets/rhcsa-httpd-base.tar
hints: Use podman images first to see what is already available.
Use podman load -i /opt/rhcsa/container-assets/rhcsa-httpd-base.tar if the base image is not already present.
The bind mount should use SELinux-aware options.
solution_outline: Either use the existing localhost/rhcsa-httpd-base:latest image or load it from the saved archive, then inspect it and save the output.
Build localhost/rhcsa-web:latest from a Containerfile in the workspace.
Run the container with a port publish and a bind mount using the proper SELinux relabel option.
Generate the unit with podman generate systemd or the equivalent supported workflow.

tasks: Inspect localhost/rhcsa-httpd-base:latest and write the inspection output to /root/rhcsa-httpd-base.inspect.json, loading /opt/rhcsa/container-assets/rhcsa-httpd-base.tar first if needed.
Use localhost/rhcsa-httpd-base:latest to build localhost/rhcsa-web:latest from /opt/rhcsa/workspaces/container/Containerfile.
Run the rhcsa-web container on host port 8080 with the provided site-content bind mount.
Generate a systemd unit so the container can be managed persistently.
solution_commands: podman image exists localhost/rhcsa-httpd-base:latest || podman load -i /opt/rhcsa/container-assets/rhcsa-httpd-base.tar
